name: Animal Cohort Setup and Randomization
preprompt: Define the study cohort, inclusion/exclusion criteria, housing conditions, acclimation period, and randomization scheme for male C57BL/6J mice at 12 months of age. Specify baseline metadata to capture, how to assign mice to treatment versus control, and how to maintain allocation concealment where possible.
tooling: Read: own data, TOCs and summaries of all other components. Write: own data only.
summary: Establishes the study population and assigns animals to groups before treatment begins.
